problem: Workflow State, Current Run/Task/Event, referenced Artifact and Worktree facts are inconsistent. The Product Review run cannot be accepted or safely discarded without preserving evidence and reconciling all state sources.
impact: M0 cannot be approved; Product Agent, business PRD edits and business-code development are blocked.
expected_fix: 已修复：Reconcile 先同步 JSON / Markdown / Round Context 并清理运行态；仅在最终诊断无分裂、无缺失 Artifact、无 orphan/prunable Worktree 时受控迁移到 READY。
verification: 2026-07-13：npm run agent:test:control-plane（15/15 PASS）；npm run agent:reconcile -- --apply --prune-worktrees --remove-orphan-worktrees（exit 0）；后续只读 reconcile（splitDetected=false，exit 0）；status/jobs/logs 与 Workflow JSON/Markdown/Round Context、Current Run/Task/Event 和 Worktree 一致。M0 effectiveApproval=false，Product Agent 未启动。
resolution: Reconcile Evidence 已生成 RECONCILED，运行态已复位为 IDLE，Workflow 已受控进入 READY；M0 仍需独立结构化 APPROVED Result。
